const Areas_Atuantes = [

    { icon: <ion-icon name="business-outline"></ion-icon>, title: 'Indústria' },
    { icon: <ion-icon name="business-outline"></ion-icon>, title: 'Condomínios' },

    { icon: <ion-icon name="business-outline"></ion-icon>, title: 'Transporte e logística' },
    { icon: <ion-icon name="business-outline"></ion-icon>, title: 'Aeroportos' },
    { icon: <ion-icon name="business-outline"></ion-icon>, title: 'Eventos' },
    { icon: <ion-icon name="business-outline"></ion-icon>, title: 'Saúde' },
    { icon: <ion-icon name="business-outline"></ion-icon>, title: 'Educação' },
    { icon: <ion-icon name="business-outline"></ion-icon>, title: 'Varejo' },
    { icon: <ion-icon name="business-outline"></ion-icon>, title: 'Outros Segmentos' },

];

export default Areas_Atuantes;
